text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With after-school training complete, I head over to the water
fountain. There, I spot Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Now that feels good!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I just put my head under the faucet! Nothing beats a cold
shower after training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wanna give it a shot?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Aw, man... But it feels so good on the shoulder muscles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As she smiles back at me, I notice her eyes look a little red...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: O-of course not! Why would I be... crying...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears well up in her eyes as she struggles to remain calm. I decide to
give her some space until she settles down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew... You've got sharp eyes, you know that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You see... I keep losing to McQueen in scrimmages.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No matter how hard I try, I just can't catch up to her. It's just so... so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Frustrating... Guess winning isn't as easy as it seems.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking closer, I notice that Mejiro Ryan appears more gaunt than
usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of our training, she also works out on her own. If she's not
properly fueling her body...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Uh... I think so? At least, I'm pretty sure I ate breakfast today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well... That makes it abundantly clear. As her trainer, there's only one
thing for me to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cafeteria is mostly deserted this late in the day. I notice Mejiro
Ryan idly looking about the room, perhaps out of boredom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before long, the XXL pork cutlet curry I ordered is placed before her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! T-Trainer, what's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: B-but eating this late in the day isn't good for—
choice_data_list: Forget about that and dig in! Just for today!
Forget about that and dig in! Just for today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, if you insist. I mean, it does look good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the food!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan devours the massive curry dish in the blink of an eye!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Mmm... mmmmm!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My tongue's screaming in delight... I can feel my muscles thanking me
for all the extra protein!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Now that I think about it... I have been a bit too preoccupied with racing lately. I don't know how long it's been since I last sat down to a full meal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I guess when I'm frustrated, I tend to forget important stuff like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not uncommon for runners to put too much focus on their failures,
causing them to neglect their health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once she opens her eyes and realizes what she's doing, I'm sure Ryan
will see what a disservice she's doing to herself and her potential.
choice_data_list: Let's unlock even more of your talent.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: My talent...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan stares out the window at the girls passing by, deep in
thought.
